meaning: 甯冨垪濉斿凹(鍗婂矝)[娉曞浗瑗垮寳閮ㄤ竴鍦板尯]
examples: In Brittany, one-third of them were women.
I remember the day Brittany came to our school.
One day, Brittany bribed a classmate to ask me to the school dance.
Sprawling out across the duneland of southern Brittany, the site is on a stupefying scale.
The twins deny a rumour that Brittany has become engaged, describing it as a "dumb joke".
